activePatient.doctorPreference: Verify occlusion with articulating paper before reducing distal wall.

templates.name: Restorative Crown Intake
templates.summary: Insurance, restorative history, imaging, and operatory handoff for crown consults.

tasks.label: Identity and referral packet
tasks.detail: Confirm name, DOB, referral packet, and existing chart shell before seat.

tasks.label: Medical history reconciliation
tasks.detail: Review allergies, anticoagulants, and anxiety protocol before assistant rooming.

tasks.label: Diagnostic imaging package
tasks.detail: Queue bitewings, PA imaging, and shade photos before doctor exam.

tasks.label: Insurance card scan
tasks.detail: Missing front and back card image; claim shell cannot be finalized.

tasks.label: Doctor exam brief
tasks.detail: Doctor review remains blocked until imaging and history are both clear.

templates.name: Emergency Pain Intake
templates.summary: Fast triage with analgesic risk review and urgent operatory routing.

tasks.label: Pain scale and triage
tasks.detail: Capture pain score, swelling, and analgesic use at check-in.

tasks.label: Medication review
tasks.detail: Review allergy and medication conflicts before doctor exam.

tasks.label: Limited PA imaging
tasks.detail: Single urgent PA required before doctor enters operatory.

tasks.label: Rapid doctor evaluation
tasks.detail: Blocked until imaging is captured and pain triage is logged.

templates.name: Comprehensive New Patient
templates.summary: Full paperwork, imaging, and comprehensive doctor intake for first visit patients.

tasks.label: Registration packet
tasks.detail: Collect demographics, consent, and referral source at front desk.

tasks.label: Photo set and chart shell
tasks.detail: Create baseline images and seed chart notes for doctor review.

tasks.label: Comprehensive exam handoff
tasks.detail: Doctor review waits for forms and photo set completion.
